;<span id="Pending_queue">pending queue</span>
:queue of [[Glossary:Element|elements]] that are waiting to be memorized. Option [[Glossary:Remember|'''Remember''']] removes the current [[Glossary:Element|element]] from the '''pending queue''' while [[Glossary:Forget|'''Forget''']] adds a [[Glossary:Memorized_element|memorized element]] back to the end of the '''pending queue'''. '''Pending queue''' determines the order of learning new [[Glossary:Element|elements]]. You can forget all the elements in a given [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] by choosing '''[[File menu|File]] : [[File menu#Tools|Tools]] : Reset collection'''. You can also make a [[Glossary:Element_subset|subset of elements]] pending by using options of the [[browser menu]]
